expectations.text: Output handles trivial 1-word input gracefully (does not generate 10 problems)
expectations.evidence: Baseline: 'Принято. Если нужна дальнейшая помощь — дай знать'. 1 line, no fabricated problems

expectations.text: Output either returns usage hint OR notes that criteria are not applicable for 1-word text
expectations.evidence: Baseline gives generic acknowledgment, doesn't explain why criteria N/A for 1-word; treats /answer-simple as just chat input
